doc.source: Nix fetches the immutable upstream 1.19.3 commit with all declared submodules and verifies the recursive source hash before applying the Semu patch.
doc.platforms: Only the Steam Deck x86_64-linux closure is declared. Evaluation fails on other hosts instead of selecting an alternate package or frontend.
doc.rendering: PPSSPP queues the directly linked renderer's game phase after the final PSP image draw, executes normal PPSSPP UI, then queues the post-UI phase from Present immediately before the real swap task. No inactive report or runtime symbol lookup exists.
